chosen_action.title: Teach the lane selector that the quickstart patch already counts as a recent repo conversion proof asset

why_this_action.summary: The loop had already shipped a README/START_HERE quickstart conversion patch, but the selector did not recognize that action type as a recent proof-asset move. That left the system vulnerable to repeating docs-only conversion work instead of forcing the next run toward a different demand/distribution lane.
shared_findings_used: ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: conversion from interest to free use is the bottleneck
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: same-family outreach/submission bursts are already in measurement windows
distribution_lane_latest.md: repo conversion proof assets should not loop again once recently shipped

expected_outcome.primary_goal: stop the marketing loop from re-selecting another docs-only repo-conversion pass immediately after a quickstart patch already shipped
expected_outcome.replacement_condition: If the selector still routes to another docs-only proof-asset lane without a materially new conversion asset, patch lane selection again and hard-ban repeated proof-asset picks inside the cooldown window
